name: HDFC Bank PIXEL Go Credit Card
exclusions: fuel spends beyond surcharge waiver terms
transactions excluded under PIXEL Go terms and conditions
milestoneBenefits: Joining fee waived on spending Rs 10,000 within 90 days of issuance
Renewal fee waived on spending Rs 50,000 or more in the preceding 12 months
additionalBenefits: Fully digital onboarding and management via PayZapp
Convert purchases into EMIs instantly via PayZapp
EMI dashboard and reward tracking in PayZapp
1% fuel surcharge waiver at fuel stations across India on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
Up to 10% savings on restaurant bill payments via Swiggy Dineout
Interest-free credit period up to 50 days
Contactless payments with Tap & Pay and Swipe to Pay
FD-backed PIXEL Credit Card option through PayZapp

selfEmployed: Annual ITR greater than Rs 6 lakh
